column1: Enabling this alone does not display the button. The law requires the revocation button to stay permanently visible during the withdrawal period, but only your theme knows where that is. After enabling, you must place the Revocation Button widget in a block shown on every storefront page (typically the footer). Until you do, the form exists at /revocation but nothing links to it.
column2: Enabling this alone does not display the button. The law requires the revocation button to stay permanently visible during the withdrawal period, but only your theme knows where that is. After enabling, you must place the Revocation Button widget in a block shown on every storefront page (typically the footer). Until you do, the form exists at /revocation but nothing links to it.
